flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Seton Hill University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.2k → $26.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Seton Hill University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Seton Hill University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (51.5% → 56.9%).
